mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.money AS "money", a.img AS "img", a.info AS "info", a.state AS "state", a.imgtitle AS "imgtitle", a.reason AS "reason", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_tixian( id, uid, money, img, info, state, imgtitle, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{money}, #{img}, #{info}, #{state}, #{imgtitle}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tixian SET uid = #{u.id}, money = #{money}, img = #{img}, info = #{info}, state = #{state}, imgtitle = #{imgtitle}, reason = #{reason}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
